summary: An archival finding aid for the Hannah Arendt Collection at the Leo Baeck Institute. The source outlines the contents of several folders containing her manuscripts and provides a brief biographical note highlighting her stance on shared responsibility in 'Eichmann in Jerusalem'.

principles.statement: Responsibility for the Holocaust does not lie solely with the Nazis.
principles.rationale: Allied nations and Jewish communal leaders who passively cooperated with the Nazis also share in the blame.

anti_patterns.description: Placing the sole responsibility for the Holocaust entirely on the Nazis.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It ignores the passive cooperation and shared blame of Allied nations and Jewish communal leaders.
